steps.title: Use the protections clue
steps.content: The because clause explains that national trails receive government protections that other areas do not. Creating a trail would therefore help the preservation efforts.

steps.title: Reject opposite verbs
steps.content: Choice A means motivate, but the sentence is about practical support from protections. Choice B means overlook, and Choice D means decrease; both contradict the context. The needed word means advance or support. The answer is C.
